summary: India operates a comprehensive digital tax administration system through the Income Tax e-Filing portal and the Goods and Services Tax Network (GSTN). The e-Filing portal handles over 70 million income tax returns annually with Aadhaar-based verification. GSTN processes all GST compliance for over 14 million registered businesses, including return filing, input tax credit matching, and e-invoicing. The Faceless Assessment and Appeals scheme conducts tax proceedings entirely online.
notes: The new e-Filing portal launched in 2021 consolidated multiple tax services into a single platform. Pre-filled returns with data from Form 26AS and Annual Information Statement (AIS) have simplified compliance. E-invoicing is mandatory for businesses above INR 5 crore turnover. TDS and TCS returns are fully digital.
